Comfortable Accommodation: Gloriana Apartments in Dumaguete offers family rooms with private bathrooms. Each apartment includes air-conditioning, a kitchenette, and a dining area. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy amenities such as a refrigerator, microwave, TV, and sofa. Additional features include a bidet, free toiletries, and a dining table. The kitchen is equipped with a stovetop, electric kettle, and kitchenware.
Prime Location: Located on Doctor Miciano Road, the apartment is a 16-minute walk from Robinsons Place Dumaguete. Nearby attractions include Dumaguete Belfry (700 metres), Quezon Park (8-minute walk), and Dumaguete Cathedral (less than 1 km). Sibulan Airport is 4 km away.

Elegant Accommodations: Villa Shangri-La in Dumaguete offers comfortable bed and breakfast rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden views. Each room includes a private pool, terrace, and free WiFi.
Outdoor Amenities: Guests can relax in the year-round outdoor swimming pool, lush garden, and spacious terrace. The property features a paid shuttle service, daily housekeeping, and bicycle parking.
Delicious Breakfast: A variety of breakfast options are available, including continental, American, buffet, and Asian. Local specialities, warm dishes, juice, and fruits are served daily.
Convenient Location: Located 8 km from Sibulan Airport, Villa Shangri-La is near attractions such as Robinsons Place Dumaguete (4.9 km) and Dumaguete Cathedral (6 km).
